employers.portalInfoDesc: After submitting your staffing request, you receive access to your own portal. Matching candidate profiles are displayed there — clearly organised, up to date and available anytime.

about.title: About RKS Fachkräfte
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for international professional placement
about.mission: Our mission is to connect qualified professionals from Morocco with top employers in Germany — fair, transparent and sustainable.
about.vision: We build a bridge between two nations and enable people to reach their full potential in Germany.
about.networkDesc: Through long-standing international contacts in Morocco and Germany, we have an exclusive network of partners, institutions and decision-makers — enabling us to identify professionals who truly match the requirements of the German labour market.
about.schoolsDesc: We work closely with selected local language schools in Morocco. Candidates are prepared not only in German, but also in culture, working life and expectations in Germany. This is how we recruit only the best and best-prepared professionals for our German partners.
about.qualityDesc: Every candidate goes through multi-stage selection: language assessment, qualification check, personal interview and matching with our employers' requirements. Quality over quantity — that is our promise.

c1.q: How long does the placement process take?
c1.a: Typically 3–6 months, depending on your qualifications and the visa process.

c2.q: What costs are involved for me?
c2.a: Placement is free for candidates. All costs are communicated transparently.

c3.q: Do I need to speak German?
c3.a: Basic skills (A2) are recommended. We support you with further language training.

c4.a: CV, education certificates, passport, and optionally language certificates and work references.

e1.q: How quickly will I receive candidate proposals?
e1.a: Within 2–4 weeks of your request, you will receive matching profiles.

e2.a: Every candidate goes through multi-stage screening: documents, qualifications, personal interview.

e3.a: Healthcare, crafts, IT, hospitality, logistics, construction and more.
